title: Social Research Students' Views on Forming Political Opinions 2020
description: This dataset consists of 12 texts written by social research students at Tampere University on their voting behaviour and the formation of their political opinions. The data were originally collected for a Bachelor's thesis. In the writing guidelines, the respondents were presented with questions to help guide their writing.
